2.0 10/09/2020  
[EIS December 2020: IBI-V6 version] 
First release of the IBI-MFC MY 
WAV-V6 product. 
Temporal coverage from 
01/01/1993 to 31/12/2019. 
Update of the MFWAM model 
code. 
Horizontal resolution increased to 5 
km. 
Implementation of SWH altimeter 
data assimilation using optimal 
interpolation algorithm and off-line 
coupling of current forcing. 
L. G. San

Issue 3.3 –November 2025 
Update of the MFWAM model 
code. 
Horizontal resolution increased from 
1/20 to 1/36º. 
New variables on the highest wave. 
New climatological dataset. 
Update of the static files. 
Renaming of the datasets. 
 
New format of the PUM document. 
 
3.1 31/05/2024 All [EIS November 2024: IBI-V7 version] 
Extension of MY wave product 
back to 1980 
Temporal extensions up to 2023 
Delivery of air-sea fluxes for WAV 
MYP from 1980 
B. Gómez 
L. Castrillo 
L. Aouf 
R. Aznar 
 
S. Cailleau
